new_claims.claim_text: Benjamin Netanyahu claims Trump administration and JD Vance reported directly to him on Iran peace talks.
new_claims.notes: Claim of foreign influence on US diplomatic efforts.

new_claims.claim_text: Indian AI startup Objectways pays workers $2-3/hr to film hand movements for AI training data, then sells footage.
new_claims.notes: Potential labor exploitation in AI data collection.

new_claims.claim_text: India is becoming a training floor for humanoid robots, with tasks depending on cheap repetitive human labor.
new_claims.notes: Broader trend of labor exploitation in AI development.

new_claims.claim_text: US naval blockade in Strait of Hormuz applies only to Iranian ports and ships, not non-Iranian traffic.
Fake Ledger Live app on Apple’s Mac App Store wiped out user’s BTC holdings.
Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign over alleged inaction in child abuse cases.
new_claims.notes: Claim of political inaction on serious ethical issues.

updated_claims.notes: Conflicting reports on the scope and impact of the Strait of Hormuz blockade. Some sources suggest it is not 'effectively closed' to all traffic, only Iranian.
Observed correlation between Strait of Hormuz events and oil price surges, but direct causation to US gas prices surpassing $4/gallon remains unverified.
